example: Do you know the love that still burns inside me?
My love for you, my longing still continues to grow
I keep it safe beneath the weight of silent care
This song reveals what's left of me
ja: 明らかにする、暴露する

example: I keep it safe beneath the weight of silent care
Through the soul, I'll let my feelings show
Hope you'll see the love that I always bear
Hope you'll see the love that I always bear
My longing still continues to grow
If I could turn the light to day
zh: 將光轉為白晝（比喻揭露真相）
ja: 光を昼に変える（比喩で真実を明らかにする）
